tagline: The Art of Swimming Pools and Spas

hero.badge_2: One Project at a Time Quality
hero.headline:
Your Dream Pool, Built By a Family
That Cares
hero.subheadline: For 28 years, Paul and the Accurate Pool team have been building and servicing pools across Southeastern Wisconsin — one project at a time, with the care your family deserves. No shortcuts, no rushed timelines, just craftsmanship you can trust.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Custom Pools, Hot Tubs &<br class="hidden md:block"> Complete Pool Care
services.subtitle: From dream-pool design to liner replacements and equipment upgrades, Accurate Pool & Spa handles every detail so you can focus on enjoying your backyard.

cards.title: Custom Pool Construction
cards.description: Design and build your dream in-ground pool, tailored to your yard and lifestyle. Paul personally oversees every project from first dig to final splash.

cards.title: Hot Tubs & Swim Spas
cards.description: Sales, installation, and expert service on luxury hot tubs and swim spas. Year-round relaxation for Wisconsin families, even through the cold months.

cards.title: Pool Liner Replacement
cards.description: Restore the look and watertight seal of your pool with professional liner replacement using premium, long-lasting materials.

cards.title: Equipment Upgrades
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, and automation systems — upgraded for better efficiency, lower energy bills, and worry-free operation.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Transform your aging pool into a modern backyard oasis. Complete renovations with updated finishes, lighting, and water features.

cards.title: Water Features & Outdoor Living
cards.description: Custom waterfalls, fountains, outdoor kitchens, and entertainment areas. We build the complete backyard experience.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Perfect Pool

steps.title: Tell Us Your Vision
steps.description: Call Paul directly or fill out the form below. We'll schedule a free on-site consultation to understand your space, your style, and your budget — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Design & Build
steps.description: As a one-project-at-a-time company, your pool gets our full attention. Paul is on-site throughout the build, ensuring every detail meets our exacting standards.

steps.title: Dive In & Enjoy
steps.description: Your custom pool is complete and swim-ready. We walk you through everything and remain your go-to resource for supplies, service, and support — for life.

about.label: Why Wisconsin Trusts Us
about.headline: One Family. One Project at a Time. 28 Years of Proof.
about.description: Since 1998, Accurate Pool & Spa has been the family-owned pool builder Southeastern Wisconsin trusts most. Owner Paul is personally involved in every single project — from the first consultation to the final walkthrough. We don't juggle dozens of jobs at once. We build one pool at a time, giving your family the focused attention and craftsmanship that has kept our business growing through referrals alone for nearly three decades.

features.title: Owner on Every Job Site
features.description: Paul personally oversees every project. You're never handed off to a crew you've never met — the owner is there start to finish.

features.title: One Project at a Time
features.description: We don't spread ourselves thin. Your pool gets our complete focus, which means higher quality and faster completion.

features.title: 28 Years, Built on Referrals
features.description: Our business has grown almost entirely through word of mouth. When your neighbors love their pool, they send their friends to us.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed, honest quote upfront. We'll walk you through every cost so you know exactly what you're investing in.

guarantee.headline: Our "Craftsmanship First" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any aspect of our work doesn't meet your expectations, we'll come back and make it right — no questions asked. With 28 years of reputation on the line, we stake our family name on every pool we build. Your satisfaction isn't just a policy; it's the foundation our business is built on.

faqs.question: How long does a custom pool build take?
faqs.answer: Most custom in-ground pools take 6-10 weeks depending on complexity and weather. Because we focus on one project at a time, we avoid the delays that come from juggling multiple jobs. Paul will give you a realistic timeline during your free consultation.

faqs.question: Do you service pools you didn't build?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We service, repair, and upgrade all pool brands and types across Southeastern Wisconsin. Whether you need a liner replacement, equipment upgrade, or ongoing maintenance — we're here to help.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We're based in Watertown and serve Lake Country and all of Southeastern Wisconsin. If you're within driving distance, give us a call — we'll let you know if we can help.

faqs.question: Can I see examples of pools you've built?
faqs.answer: Yes! We're happy to share photos of completed projects and even connect you with past customers. After 28 years, our best marketing is the pools we've already built and the families who love them.

faqs.question: Do you sell hot tub supplies and chemicals?
faqs.answer: We carry a full range of pool and hot tub chemicals, accessories, and supplies. Many customers make the drive to our Watertown location because they trust our product recommendations and personal service.

testimonials.name: Chris B.
testimonials.text: Our pool looks great, and they made it happen before Memorial Day! Couldn't be happier with the timing and the quality of the work.

testimonials.name: Trent N.
testimonials.text: Paul's always great to work with and he always fits us in his busy schedule. That kind of personal service is hard to find these days.

testimonials.name: Leah W.
testimonials.text: Paul was wonderful — answered my millions of questions, made sure we had supplies and preplanning we needed, and was available on weekends and evenings. We'll be making the drive to Watertown for all our pool needs.

contact.headline:
Ready to Build Your
Dream Pool?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation consultation with Paul. We'll visit your property, discuss your vision, and provide an honest quote — no pushy sales tactics, just straight talk from a family that's been doing this for 28 years.

footer.description: Family-owned pool builder serving Southeastern Wisconsin since 1998.
